title: Bitter Rice Bliss
description: A one-pot Algerian dish featuring crispy rice paper sheets, a touch of bitterness in the form of bitter melon or cucumber, and aromatic spices for a refreshing low-carb meal.
instructions: Preheat a pan over medium heat.
Place the rice paper sheets in a single layer on the pan and sprinkle a pinch of aromatic spices evenly across them.
Cut the bitter melon or cucumber into thin slices and place alternating layers between the rice paper sheets, pressing down gently to keep everything together.
Cover with another sheet of rice paper to seal all ingredients inside. Cook for about 5-7 minutes until the edges start to brown slightly.
Carefully remove from heat and slice the dish in half diagonally to serve.
